underlying_goal: Calculate OpenAI API pricing estimates for different models and request volumes for a search query use case
friction_detail: Claude initially misread 'o4-mini' as 'gpt-4o-mini' and provided wrong model pricing, which the user had to correct.
brief_summary: User wanted API cost estimates for OpenAI models across varying request volumes and token counts, and after an initial model mix-up, got accurate pricing calculations.
